name: ace-step
description: ACE-Step 全栈音乐生成工具 — Python 引擎 + Node.js 编排 + React 前端

scripts.dev: echo '请手动启动: uv run acestep & npx tsx packages/server/src/index.ts & npm run dev -w packages/front'
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/engine && npm run typecheck -w packages/server && npm run typecheck -w packages/front && npm run typecheck -w packages/shared
